option.name: OTHER_OPTIONS
option.value: -encoding UTF-8 -docencoding UTF-8 -charset UTF-8 -overview src/main/javadoc/overview.html -group Match cz.phsoft.hokej.match* -group Player cz.phsoft.hokej.player* -group Registration cz.phsoft.hokej.registration* -group Notifications cz.phsoft.hokej.notifications* -group Season cz.phsoft.hokej.season* -group "Core & Config" cz.phsoft.hokej.config*:cz.phsoft.hokej.security*
